Hey all, Lamar here!
Noticed something different? Maybe the UI got a little glow-up, maybe the animations move like butter, or maybe your device just breathed a sigh of relief. You'll never know if you don't download this update - the game’s looking good - just like you on a Saturday night.

title: Hole.io
notes:
The hole is hungry - and now, so is your inner collector.

• COLLECTIBLES ARE HERE - Dive into levels, hunt for hidden spheres, and crack them open to discover unique figurines. Build your themed Album, complete the set before time runs out, and earn special rewards along the way. Got duplicates? Turn them into coins and keep hunting.
• A CLEANER GAME - Banner ads have been completely removed. Nothing between you and your next meal.

Swallow it all. Update now!

title: Jewel Coloring
notes:
Thank you for your support!
This update brings new content and visual refinements to enhance your gameplay experience:
1. New Levels Unlocked: The total level count has reached Level 3000—more puzzles await!
2. Gallery Refresh: We've optimized the puzzle gallery for smoother browsing and a more intuitive way to view your collections.

We’re always working to make the app better
